title: AI Engineer
blurb: Builds intelligent systems that learn from data.
nature_of_work: Designs, trains, and deploys machine learning and AI models that power products like recommendation engines, chatbots, and computer vision systems.
educational_pathways: Class 11-12: Science with Maths & Computer Science
B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science, AI or Data Science
Optional: M.Tech / M.S. in AI or ML
typical_day: Reviewing data pipelines, experimenting with model architectures, reading research papers, and collaborating with product teams to ship features.

title: Doctor (Physician)
blurb: Diagnoses and treats patients to improve health outcomes.
nature_of_work: Examines patients, diagnoses illnesses, prescribes treatment, and provides preventive care in hospitals or clinics.
typical_day: Morning rounds, patient consultations, reviewing lab reports, and coordinating with specialists on treatment plans.

title: Commercial Pilot
blurb: Flies aircraft and ensures passenger safety.
nature_of_work: Operates aircraft for airlines, manages flight plans, monitors systems, and ensures safe takeoff, cruising, and landing.
typical_day: Pre-flight briefings, safety checks, flying scheduled routes, and post-flight reporting.

title: Research Scientist
blurb: Conducts experiments to discover new knowledge.
nature_of_work: Designs experiments, analyzes data, and publishes findings in fields like physics, biology, chemistry, or environmental science.
educational_pathways: M.Sc / Ph.D for advanced research roles
typical_day: Lab experiments, data analysis, literature review, and writing research papers or grant proposals.

title: Teacher / Educator
blurb: Shapes young minds and builds foundational knowledge.
nature_of_work: Plans lessons, teaches subjects, assesses student progress, and mentors students academically and personally.
typical_day: Teaching classes, grading assignments, preparing lesson plans, and mentoring students.

title: Entrepreneur
blurb: Builds and scales new ventures and products.
nature_of_work: Identifies market problems, builds products or services, raises funding, and leads teams to grow a business.
educational_pathways: Any stream — business acumen matters more than a specific degree
salary_range: Highly variable — from ₹0 to crores depending on venture success
typical_day: Investor meetings, product reviews, team stand-ups, and strategic planning.

title: Architect
blurb: Designs functional and beautiful buildings and spaces.
nature_of_work: Plans and designs residential, commercial, or public buildings, balancing aesthetics, safety, and functionality.
educational_pathways: Class 11-12: any stream with Maths (NATA prefers Maths)
typical_day: Client meetings, sketching design concepts, reviewing blueprints, and site visits.

title: Game Developer
blurb: Creates the games millions of people play.
nature_of_work: Designs game mechanics, writes game code, builds levels, and works with artists and sound designers to create engaging games.
educational_pathways: B.Tech/B.Sc in Computer Science or Game Design
typical_day: Writing gameplay code, testing builds, fixing bugs, and iterating on player feedback.

title: Data Scientist
blurb: Turns raw data into actionable business insights.
nature_of_work: Collects and analyzes large datasets, builds predictive models, and communicates insights to guide business decisions.
educational_pathways: B.Tech/B.Sc in CS, Statistics or related field
typical_day: Cleaning datasets, building models, creating dashboards, and presenting findings to stakeholders.

title: Civil Engineer
blurb: Designs and builds infrastructure that shapes cities.
nature_of_work: Plans, designs, and oversees construction of roads, bridges, buildings, and water systems.
typical_day: Site inspections, reviewing structural designs, coordinating with contractors, and ensuring safety compliance.
